description: Risk analysis for a Proposal, derived from action impact levels and scope analysis. Drives approval_required on the parent Proposal via requires_approval(). Governed as a sub-object of Proposal (src/will/autonomy/proposal.py). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1. VOCABULARY DISCREPANCY: class docstring and requires_approval() use 'safe/moderate/dangerous'; .intent/META/enums.json proposal_risk declares 'safe/moderate/high'. This contract reflects live class semantics ('dangerous'). Governor decision required to reconcile: either rename 'dangerous' to 'high' in src/ or update the enum. Tracked as a constitutional vocabulary drift finding.

overall_risk.description: Aggregate risk level. Live class values: safe, moderate, dangerous. Discrepancy with proposal_risk enum (which declares 'high' not 'dangerous') — see contract description. requires_approval() returns True for 'moderate' and 'dangerous'.

action_risks.description: Per-action risk levels keyed by action_id. Values are impact_level strings.

risk_factors.description: Human-readable risk explanations surfaced to the governor.

mitigation.description: Declared mitigations for identified risk factors.
